topic_breadcrumb: 04 – Procedures Applicable to Facilities Offering Specific Types of Training
title: M22-4, Part 10, Compliance Survey. Chapter 04, Procedures Applicable to Facilities Offering Specific Types of Training.
description: This chapter provides survey guidance regarding specific types of training such as NCD, Correspondence, Flight, On-The-Job, Apprenticeship, and more.
keywords: OJT, training, compliance, review, inspection, aid, assistance, NCD, verification, audit, 1999, 1999b
